item.title: Scaling Laws Revisited
item.author: sebastian@example.com (Sebastian R.)
item.description: A look back at what scaling laws got right and wrong this year.

item.title: Open Weights, Closed Data
item.author: sebastian@example.com (Sebastian R.)
item.description: Why weight releases without data/methodology disclosure limit reproducibility.

item.title: Notes from ICML Hallway Tracks
item.author: sebastian@example.com (Sebastian R.)
item.description: Unofficial takeaways nobody puts in the proceedings.
